description: Product Description Wisdom Fresh Effect antibacterial mouthwash fights plaque and bacteria, helps to freshen breath and the added fluoride strengthens teeth to fight decay. Fresh Effect mouthwash even cleans between the teeth where brushing and flossing may have missed, to complete the 3 steps to a 100% clean. Ingredients Aqua, Alcohol, Glycerin, Polysorbate 20, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Saccharin, Aroma, Cetylpyridinium Chloride, Sodium Fluoride, Menthol, Benzoic Acid, CI 42051 Directions Shake well before use. Use about 20 ml (about 4 teaspoons) of mouthwash. Rinse your mouth for 30 seconds and spit out. Do not swallow. Use daily after brushing. Safety Warning Warning: Do not swallow. Keep out of the reach of children. Not suitable for use by children under 6 years of age. Box Contains 1 x Wisdom Fresh Effect Coolmint Antibacterial Mouthwash 500 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Wisdom Toothbrushes Ltd., Haverhill, England, CB9 8DT. RP.
